name: 07 - Shopify Order → Fulfillment + Thank You Email

parameters.jsCode: const order = $input.first().json; const lineItems = (order.line_items || []).map(item => ({ name: item.name, quantity: item.quantity, price: parseFloat(item.price), sku: item.sku || '', requiresShipping: item.requires_shipping !== false, vendor: item.vendor || '' })); const shippingAddress = order.shipping_address || order.billing_address || {}; const requiresFulfillment = lineItems.some(i => i.requiresShipping); const isDigitalOnly = lineItems.every(i => !i.requiresShipping); const itemsHtml = lineItems.map(item => ` ${item.name} ${item.quantity} $${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)} ` ).join(''); return [{ json: { orderId: order.id, orderName: order.name, orderNumber: order.order_number, email: order.email, firstName: order.customer?.first_name || shippingAddress.first_name || 'Customer', lastName: order.customer?.last_name || shippingAddress.last_name || '', phone: order.customer?.phone || shippingAddress.phone || '', totalPrice: parseFloat(order.total_price || 0).toFixed(2), subtotalPrice: parseFloat(order.subtotal_price || 0).toFixed(2), shippingPrice: parseFloat(order.total_shipping_price_set?.shop_money?.amount || 0).toFixed(2), currency: order.currency || 'USD', paymentStatus: order.financial_status, fulfillmentStatus: order.fulfillment_status || 'unfulfilled', requiresFulfillment, isDigitalOnly, shippingName: [shippingAddress.first_name, shippingAddress.last_name].join(' ').trim(), shippingStreet: shippingAddress.address1 || '', shippingCity: shippingAddress.city || '', shippingProvince: shippingAddress.province || '', shippingZip: shippingAddress.zip || '', shippingCountry: shippingAddress.country || '', lineItems, itemsHtml, itemCount: lineItems.reduce((s, i) => s + i.quantity, 0), tags: order.tags || '', createdAt: order.created_at } }];

parameters.subject: Thank you for your order, {{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.firstName }}! 🎉 Order {{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.orderName }}
parameters.message:
Order Confirmed! 🎉

{{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.orderName }}

Hey {{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.firstName }},

Thank you so much for your order! We're getting it ready and will notify you when it ships.

Order Summary

{{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.itemsHtml }}
Item Qty Price
Total: ${{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.totalPrice }} {{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.currency }}
{{ $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.requiresFulfillment ? '

Shipping To

' + $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.shippingStreet + '
' + $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.shippingCity + ', ' + $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.shippingProvince + ' ' + $('Code - Parse Order Data').item.json.shippingZip + '

' : '

Your digital items are ready to access in your account.

' }}

Questions? Reply to this email or visit our Help Center.

With gratitude,
Your Store Team

meta.description: Triggers on new Shopify orders, parses all order details, checks if items need physical shipping and payment is confirmed, then auto-creates fulfillment and sends a branded thank-you email.
prerequisites: Shopify API credentials (Private App or Custom App)
Shopify webhook configured for orders/create topic
Update email template with your store name/URL

testingScenario.happy_path: Create test order in Shopify → fulfillment created, thank you email sent
edge_cases: Unpaid order (pending) → IF prevents fulfillment, still sends email
Digital-only order → skips fulfillment, email says 'check your account'
Missing customer email → Gmail node will fail, add IF check
Shopify fulfillment already exists → may return 422
